# Arnav Goel (Yash) — Portfolio

> Data Science student at UC San Diego specializing in Machine Learning, Graph Theory, and Entrepreneurship.

## About

Arnav Goel, also known as Yash, is a Data Science student at UC San Diego (GPA: 3.96/4.0) with a minor in Entrepreneurship & Innovation. He is the founder and operator of Gondilal Saraf, a century-old family jewelry business. His work spans Machine Learning, Graph Theory, Web Development, and data-driven business strategy.

## Education

- **UC San Diego** — BS Data Science (Minor: Entrepreneurship & Innovation), Sep 2022 – Jun 2026, GPA: 3.96/4.0
- **Delhi Public School, R. K. Puram** — High School, Engineering Science, Apr 2020 – Jun 2022, Grade: 96.75%

## Experience

- **SWE Intern** at UC San Diego (2024 – Present)
- **Founder & Operator** at Gondilal Saraf (2022 – Present)

## Projects

- **Vaani — Multilingual AI Chatbot**: Real-time, voice-enabled AI chatbot using OpenAI's API supporting 5+ Indian languages with speech-to-text and text-to-speech pipelines.
- **Style It — AI Wardrobe Assistant**: AI-powered wardrobe assistant with TensorFlow recommendation engine. Boosted recommendation performance by 30% with semantic vector matching.
- **Handwritten Digits Classifier**: MNIST digit classification using TensorFlow and deep learning.
- **Pet Classifier Model**: Pet animal classification using CNN framework for image recognition.
- **PCOD Tracker — AI Health Companion**: AI-powered health management app for women with PCOD/PCOS. Users vent freely and Claude AI (Sonnet 4) auto-extracts symptoms, mood, diet, and medications from natural language. Upload lab report PDFs and AI parses hormone levels, flags abnormal values, and detects medications. Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, PostgreSQL with 15 Prisma models, 14 API routes, NextAuth (Google OAuth + credentials), Recharts for lab trend visualization, calendar heatmaps, medication streak tracking. Privacy-first, PWA-ready. Live at https://pcod-tracker.vercel.app
- **Gondilal Saraf — Full-Stack Jewelry Platform**: Full-stack e-commerce platform for a century-old family jewelry business (est. 1915). Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, PostgreSQL with 15 Prisma models, 26 API routes. Features: bilingual Hindi/English storefront, live gold rates with 10-year investment charts, product catalogue with AR virtual try-on (MediaPipe), AI-generated descriptions (Gemini 2.0 Flash), AI model images (Replicate SDXL), admin ERP with image pipeline (Photoroom + Sharp), OTP auth via WhatsApp, AES encryption, EMI calculator, and 85 tests. Heritage design system with cinematic gate animation, parallax, glassmorphism, 3 themes. Live at https://gondilalsaraf.com

## Skills

Python, TensorFlow, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Graph Theory, Data Science, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Web Development, Recommendation Systems, Entrepreneurship, Business Strategy

## Certifications

- Neural Networks and Deep Learning — DeepLearning.AI (Jul 2024)
- Machine Learning Specialization — Stanford University (Jul 2024)
